introSection: Speed Bobsleigh (Japanese: スピードボブスレー) was a steel roller coaster previously located at Nasu Highland Park in Nasu, Nasu, Tochigi, Japan.

sections.title: External links

fullText:
Speed Bobsleigh (Japanese: スピードボブスレー) was a steel roller coaster previously located at Nasu Highland Park in Nasu, Nasu, Tochigi, Japan.



Mint track and white supports.




 * Speed Bobsleigh on the parks website (Japanese)
